items.title: Down 22%, Here's How Adobe Could Follow in Salesforce's Footsteps to Become a Strong Buy in 2025
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: Adobe's stock is down 22% YTD, while Salesforce has surged. Salesforce's AI-driven growth narrative has excited investors, while Adobe lacks a clear roadmap for monetizing AI. However, Adobe's valuation and growth potential make it an attractive long-term investment.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Despite the recent sell-off, Adobe's valuation and growth potential make it an attractive long-term investment. The company is poised for solid growth in fiscal 2025, with a forward P/E ratio of just 22.5.

Salesforce has a compelling AI opportunity with its Agentforce platform, which is expected to contribute significantly to its top and bottom-line growth. Investors are excited about Salesforce's AI-driven growth narrative.
